description: AITuber is an AI video creation platform for generating faceless videos, Shorts, Reels, and other narrated content with AI visuals, captions, and rendering. It supports multiple video styles and templates and can export finished videos as MP4s.
summary: AITuber exposes two developer integration surfaces on aituber.app: a REST API for AI video creation and an MCP server distributed as the `@aituber/mcp-server` npm package; both require an AITuber API key.
